---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaving unexpectedly
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**What happened?**
A clear, short description of the bug.

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Go to...
2. Say / type...
3. See error

**Expected behavior**
What should have happened.

**Screenshots or screen recording**
If applicable — especially for canvas/voice issues.

**Environment**
- OS: (Windows / macOS / Linux / Android / iOS)
- Browser: (Chrome / Edge / Firefox / Safari + version)
- AI Mode: (Gemini / Ollama / Auto)
- Node version: (`node --version`)

**Any error messages?**
Paste from browser DevTools console (F12) or terminal.
